tighter.$description: Apple's signature body tracking — buttons, paragraphs, and UI labels at text sizes.

tight.$description: Large display tracking — H1 and hero headlines pull in slightly at scale.

normal.$description: Neutral tracking for mid-level headings (H2/H3) where SF sits near its natural metrics.

wide.$description: Opened-up tracking for small uppercase labels (section headings, eyebrows).

wider.$description: Widest tracking for tiny all-caps eyebrows that need breathing room.
